title: Rock and Roll
why_this_song: Rock and Roll by Led Zeppelin (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 20 times; first heard in: "Been a long lonely, lonely, lonely, lonely, lonely time"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "It's been a long time since I rock and rolled"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "It's been a long time since I rock and rolled"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "It's been a long time since I rock and rolled"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "It's been a long time since I rock and rolled"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Carry me back, carry me back

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lonely" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lonely" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "long" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "long" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Carry me back, baby, where I come from
Making vows that just can't work right

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Rock and Roll" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Rock and Roll" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Rock and Roll" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Rock and Roll"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Led Zeppelin one question about "Rock and Roll", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Led Zeppelin sobre "Rock and Roll", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
